subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of the threshold of Truth! Beseech ye God that ye may become confirmed in self-sacrifice and attain unto the altar of love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده درگاه حق از خدا بخواهید که موفق بجانفشانی گردید و بقربانگاه عشق
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @the concourse on high, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
